response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the role's primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrated ownership across backend, frontend, and DevOps with a clear craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD).
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React background across multiple senior roles
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling experience matches a key requirement
Polyglot engineer with Java, DLang, Python exposure and DevOps/Docker/K8s skills
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Limited evidence of recent Kotlin work for the secondary backend stack
Cloud experience skews AWS with less detail on GCP/Azure

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
